auth.label: Stack API Key
auth.description: Contentstack stack API key sent with the api_key header. Find it with the Delivery Token in your stack under Settings > Tokens > Delivery Tokens: https://www.contentstack.com/docs/developers/create-tokens/about-delivery-tokens

extraFields.label: Delivery Token
extraFields.description: Contentstack Delivery Token sent with the access_token header for published content. Create or view it under Settings > Tokens > Delivery Tokens: https://www.contentstack.com/docs/developers/create-tokens/create-a-delivery-token

extraFields.label: Branch UID
extraFields.description: Optional Contentstack branch UID sent with the branch header when your stack uses branches.

actions.name: get_content_type
actions.description: Retrieve one Contentstack content type schema by UID.

contentTypeUid.description: The Contentstack UID identifying the requested resource.

branch.description: The optional Contentstack branch UID passed with the branch request header.

includeBranch.description: Whether Contentstack should include the _branch field.

includeGlobalFieldSchema.description: Whether Contentstack should include global field schemas in content type responses.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for retrieving one Contentstack content type.

actions.name: get_entry
actions.description: Retrieve one published Contentstack entry for a content type.

contentTypeUid.description: The Contentstack UID identifying the requested resource.

entryUid.description: The Contentstack UID identifying the requested resource.

environment.description: The Contentstack publishing environment to read published content from.

branch.description: The optional Contentstack branch UID passed with the branch request header.

locale.description: The optional Contentstack locale code for localized content.

query.description: A Contentstack query object serialized into the query URL parameter.

includeMetadata.description: Whether Contentstack should include extension metadata.

includePublishDetails.description: Whether Contentstack should include publish details in entry responses.

includeFallback.description: Whether Contentstack should return fallback locale content when localized content is missing.

includeBranch.description: Whether Contentstack should include the _branch field.

includeFields.description: Contentstack field UIDs to include or exclude in the response.

excludeFields.description: Contentstack field UIDs to include or exclude in the response.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for retrieving one Contentstack entry.

actions.name: list_assets
actions.description: List published Contentstack assets in a stack.

environment.description: The Contentstack publishing environment to read published content from.

branch.description: The optional Contentstack branch UID passed with the branch request header.

locale.description: The optional Contentstack locale code for localized content.

query.description: A Contentstack query object serialized into the query URL parameter.

limit.description: The maximum number of items to return. Contentstack returns at most 100 items.

skip.description: The number of items to skip for pagination.

includeCount.description: Whether Contentstack should include the total item count.

includeMetadata.description: Whether Contentstack should include extension metadata.

includeFallback.description: Whether Contentstack should return fallback locale content when localized content is missing.

includeBranch.description: Whether Contentstack should include the _branch field.

includeDimension.description: Whether Contentstack should include image dimension details in asset responses.

asc.description: A Contentstack field UID used to sort the returned items.

desc.description: A Contentstack field UID used to sort the returned items.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for listing Contentstack assets.

anyOf.description: The total asset count when included by Contentstack.

actions.name: list_content_types
actions.description: List content types available in a Contentstack stack.

branch.description: The optional Contentstack branch UID passed with the branch request header.

query.description: A Contentstack query object serialized into the query URL parameter.

limit.description: The maximum number of items to return. Contentstack returns at most 100 items.

skip.description: The number of items to skip for pagination.

includeCount.description: Whether Contentstack should include the total item count.

includeBranch.description: Whether Contentstack should include the _branch field.

includeGlobalFieldSchema.description: Whether Contentstack should include global field schemas in content type responses.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for listing Contentstack content types.

anyOf.description: The total content type count when included by Contentstack.

actions.name: list_entries
actions.description: List published Contentstack entries for a content type.

contentTypeUid.description: The Contentstack UID identifying the requested resource.

environment.description: The Contentstack publishing environment to read published content from.

branch.description: The optional Contentstack branch UID passed with the branch request header.

locale.description: The optional Contentstack locale code for localized content.

query.description: A Contentstack query object serialized into the query URL parameter.

limit.description: The maximum number of items to return. Contentstack returns at most 100 items.

skip.description: The number of items to skip for pagination.

includeCount.description: Whether Contentstack should include the total item count.

includeMetadata.description: Whether Contentstack should include extension metadata.

includePublishDetails.description: Whether Contentstack should include publish details in entry responses.

includeFallback.description: Whether Contentstack should return fallback locale content when localized content is missing.

includeBranch.description: Whether Contentstack should include the _branch field.

includeFields.description: Contentstack field UIDs to include or exclude in the response.

excludeFields.description: Contentstack field UIDs to include or exclude in the response.

asc.description: A Contentstack field UID used to sort the returned items.

desc.description: A Contentstack field UID used to sort the returned items.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for listing Contentstack entries of one content type.

anyOf.description: The total entry count when included by Contentstack.
